title: Able Healers
description: Whenever a being restores Hit Points to another character by any means, or Aids Another who is doing so, the target regains an additional 5 Hit Points. OR Once per encounter as a Swift Action, the being can grant an adjacent ally Bonus Hit Points equal to 10 + the being's Character Level, which last until the end of the encounter.

title: Accelerated Learning
description: Before 50 years of age, a being can have a maximum Intelligence score of 8. Around 50 years of age, a Lugubraa's Intelligence score naturally increases by 1d4+2 points.

title: Acceleration
description: When Running, beings may take a -5 penalty on Perception checks, and have their Speed doubled.

title: Aggressive
description: If a being hits with a Charge attack, the +2 bonus on attack rolls against the target persists for the duration of the encounter.

title: Ancient Knowledge
description: Beings reduce the penalty for not being proficient in a weapon from -5 to -2, and reduce the Armor Check Penalty for Armor they are not proficient in by one step (-5 for Heavy Armor, -2 for Medium Armor, and no penalty for Light Armor). All other penalties for not being proficient still apply. Beings reduce the penalty for not being proficient in a weapon from -5 to -2, and reduce the Armor Check Penalty for Armor they are not proficient in by one step (-5 for Heavy Armor, -2 for Medium Armor, and no penalty for Light Armor). All other penalties for not being proficient still apply. Additionally, once per encounter the being can use a Trained-only application of the Mechanics, Pilot, Treat Injury, or Use Computer skills, even if Untrained in that Skill.

title: Animal Handler
description: A being can choose to reroll any Ride check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse. Additionally, a being can make Persuasion checks to change the Attitude of an undomesticated creature that has an Intelligence score of 2 or lower.

title: Armor Training
description: Beings increase their Maximum Dexterity bonus from worn Armor by +1.

title: Athletic
description: A being can reroll any Climb or Jump check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse. In addition, a being can Take 10 on Climb and Jump checks even when distracted or threatened.

title: Authority
description: Beings add a +1 bonus to any insight or morale bonuses they grant to themselves or other characters.

title: Beastly Traits
description: A being gains two Beastly Traits; create these qualities (with approval from your Gamemaster), or select two using the Creature Generator.

title: Bellow
description: As a Standard Action, a being can release an incredible Bellow. The being makes a special attack roll (1d20 + its Character Level) and compares the result to the Fortitude Defense of all creatures and unattended objects in a 6-Square Cone. A successful hit deals 3d6 points of Sonic damage; if the attack misses, the target takes half damage instead. Each use of this ability moves the being -1 step along the Condition Track. A being can choose to add more dice (d6s) to the damage it deals with its Bellow, but each additional 1d6 of damage moves the being another -1 step along the Condition Track.

title: Bioknowledge
description: A being may choose to reroll any Knowledge (Life Science) or Treat Injury check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Biotech Proficiency
description: Beings suffer no penalties while wielding Biotechnology.

title: Bonus Class Skill (Climb)
description: Climb is always a Class Skill for beings.

title: Bonus Class Skill (Gather Information)
description: Gather Information is always a Class Skill for beings.

title: Bonus Class Skill (Mechanics)
description: Mechanics is always a Class Skill for beings.

title: Bonus Class Skill (Persuasion)
description: Persuasion is always a Class Skill for beings.

title: Bonus Class Skill (Stealth)
description: Stealth is always a Class Skill for beings.

title: Bonus Class Skill (Survival)
description: Survival is always a Class Skill for beings.

title: Bonus Equipment
description: Beings can be constructed with two of the following Droid Systems installed - Internal Comlink, Darkvision, Diagnostics Package, Improved Sensor Package, Internal Storage (subject to size limitations), Translator Unit (DC 15).

title: Bonus Feat
description: Beings gain one bonus Feat at 1st level.

title: Bonus Feat (Armor Proficiency (Light))
description: Beings receive the Armor Proficiency (Light) Feat at 1st level as a bonus Feat.

title: Bonus Feat (Force Sensitivity)
description: Beings receive the Force Sensitivity feat at 1st level as a bonus Feat.

title: Bonus Feat (Improved Damage Threshold)
description: Beings gain Improved Damage Threshold as a bonus Feat.

title: Bonus Feat (Martial Arts I)
description: Beings receive the Martial Arts I feat at 1st level as a bonus Feat.

title: Bonus Feat (Rapid Shot)
description: Beings gain the Rapid Shot feat as a bonus Feat at 1st level.

title: Bonus Feat (Rapid Strike)
description: Beings gain the Rapid Strike feat as a bonus Feat at 1st level.

title: Bonus Feat (Skill Training (Knowledge (Technology)))
description: Beings gain Skill Training (Knowledge (Technology)) as a bonus Feat at 1st level.

title: Bonus Feat (Weapon Proficiency (Advanced Melee Weapons))
description: Beings gain Weapon Proficiency (Advanced Melee Weapons) as a bonus Feat.

title: Bonus Trained Skill
description: A being chooses one additional Trained Skill at 1st level. The Skill must be chosen from the character's list of Class Skills.

title: Bonus Trained Skill (Use Computer)
description: Beings gain Use Computer as a bonus Trained Skill, regardless of their Class.

title: Breathe Underwater
description: Beings can't drown in water.

title: Broadcast Telepath
description: Beings can use the Telepathy application of the Use the Force skill Untrained, even if they do not possess the Force Sensitivity feat. A being automatically succeeds on this check to communicate with willing targets within 60 squares of it and in its line of sight.

title: Brutal
description: Once per encounter, after making a successful melee attack, a being may treat its opponent's Damage Threshold as though it were 5 points lower when determining the result of the attack.

title: Carapace
description: Beings gain a +1 Natural Armor bonus to their Reflex Defense and a +1 Natural Armor bonus to their Fortitude Defense. A Natural Armor bonus stacks with an Armor bonus.

title: Careful Worker
description: A being who takes twice the normal amount of time required to use the Mechanics skill gains a +10 circumstance bonus to the Mechanics check.

title: Climbing
description: Indicated race has a natural climb speed.

title: Cold Resistance
description: Beings gain a +5 Species bonus to their Fortitude Defense to resist Extreme Cold.

title: Cold-Blooded
description: A being takes a -5 penalty to their Fortitude Defense to resist Extreme Cold.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Dual Weapon Mastery I)
description: A being gains Dual Weapon Mastery I as a bonus Feat at 1st level, provided he or she meets the prerequisites of the Feat (Minimum Dexterity of 13 and a Base Attack Bonus of +1).

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Force Training)
description: A being who has Use the Force as a Trained Skill gains Force Training as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Mighty Swing)
description: A being gains Mighty Swing as a bonus Feat at 1st level, provided he or she meets the prerequisites of the Feat (minimum Strength of 13).

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Precise Shot)
description: A being with the Point-Blank Shot feat gains the Precise Shot feat as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Running Attack)
description: A being gains Running Attack as a bonus Feat at 1st level, provided he or she meets the prerequisites of the Feat (Minimum Dexterity of 13).

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Acrobatics))
description: A being with Acrobatics as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Acrobatics) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Climb))
description: A being who has Climb as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Climb) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Deception))
description: A being with Deception as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Deception) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Endurance))
description: A being with Endurance as a Trained Skill gain Skill Focus (Endurance) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Gather Information))
description: A being with Gather Information as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Gather Information) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Initiative))
description: A being with Initiative as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Initiative) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Knowledge (Life Sciences)))
description: A being with Knowledge (Life Sciences) as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Knowledge (Life Sciences)) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Mechanics))
description: A being who has Mechanics as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Mechanics) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Perception))
description: A being with Perception as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Perception) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Persuasion))
description: A being with Persuasion as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Persuasion) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Survival))
description: A being with Survival as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Survival) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Skill Focus (Treat Injury))
description: A being with Treat Injury as a Trained Skill gains Skill Focus (Treat Injury) as a bonus Feat.

title: Conditional Bonus Feat (Tech Specialist)
description: A being who has Mechanics as a Trained Skill gains the Tech Specialist feat as a bonus Feat.

title: Confusion
description: Once per encounter as a Standard Action, a being can make a Deception check against the Will Defense of all targets within 6 squares. If the Deception check result equals or exceeds a target's Will Defense, that target does not Threaten any squares until the end of the being's next turn. This is a Mind-Affecting effect.

title: Connections
description: Whenever a being makes a Gather Information check to Learn Secret Information, they can fogo the credit cost. If this check fails, the being can try again, but must spend the credits as normal.

title: Cooperative
description: A being automatically succeeds when attempting to Aid Another on a Skill Check, as long as the target is adjacent to, and can hear and understand, the being.

title: Cooperative Spirit
description: Beings can Aid Another on Skill Checks made by adjacent allies as a Swift Action, and others can likewise aid beings on Skill Checks as Swift Actions when adjacent to the being.

title: Damage Reduction (2)
description: Beings gain a Species bonus of Damage Reduction 2.

title: Dark Side Stigma
description: Beings must spend 2 Force Points to reduce their Dark Side Score by 1 (instead of just 1 Force Point).

title: Dark-Infused
description: Beings gain the Force Training feat as a bonus Feat, but half of the Force Powers selected with this bonus Feat must have the [Dark Side] descriptor, and none can have the [Light Side] descriptor.

title: Darkvision
description: Beings ignore Concealment (including Total Concealment) from darkness. However, they cannot perceive colors in total darkness.

title: Deathstrike
description: Whenever a being makes a melee attack against an opponent that is denied its Dexterity bonus to its Reflex Defense, the being's attack, if successful, deals +1 die of damage.

title: Deceptive
description: A being may reroll any Deception check, but must accept the result of the reroll, even if it is worse.

title: Deductive Reasoning
description: A being can reroll any Knowledge check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Dependable Worker
description: Once per encounter, a being can treat one Skill Check with certain Skills (Climb, Endurance, Gather Information, Jump, Knowledge, Mechanics, Pilot, Ride, Survival, Swim, Treat Injury, or Use Computer) as though he or she had Taken 10, even after the roll has been made (but before the result of the check is known).

title: Desert Dweller
description: When making Survival checks to resist the effects of Extreme Heat, beings can reroll the check, keeping the better of the two results.

title: Determination
description: Once per encounter, a being can reroll one Skill Check after rolling a Natural 1. The being must take the result of the reroll, even if it is worse.

title: Driven
description: A being gains a +5 Species bonus to their Will Defense against Mind-Affecting effects.

title: Droid Shell
description: Beings must inhabit Droid Bodies to travel and function in the galaxy at large. In this form, they gain the following traits: Beings must undergo Maintenance, as per a Droid. Beings are immune to Poison, Radiation, noncorrosive Atmospheric Hazards, and Vacuum. They can regain Hit Points only through the Repair Droid application of the Mechanics skill. They do not benefit from Natural Healing, unless they have the Force Repair Talent. Beings are considered cybernetic creatures for the purposes of Ion Damage. Beings can make use of Droid systems and accessories, subject to some limitations. Beings can have the following Droid Systems, with a Cost Modifier of x1 - Appendages, Droid Armor, Communications Systems, Compartment Space, Sensor Systems, Translator Units.

title: Droid Traits
description: Beings operate as if they are 4th-Degree Droids, except that they ignore the Maintenance requirement. Replica Droids have all Droid Immunities and normal Droid Traits.

title: Duty Bound
description: Once per encounter when a being receives a morale bonus of any kind from any source, the being gains Bonus Hit Points equal to 4 x the being's Character Level until the end of the encounter.

title: Ecological Awareness
description: A being can choose to reroll any Knowledge (Life Sciences) check, keeping the better of the two results.

title: Empathy
description: Beings add their Charisma bonus (if any) to Perception checks made to Sense Deception or Sense Influence.

title: Energy Drain
description: As a Swift Action once per round, a being can drain energy from a Grabbed target, moving the target -1 step on the Condition Track as a Persistent Condition, and granting the being Bonus Hit Points equal to 5 + half the being's Character Level. The being can repeat this action each round until the target escapes the Grab, or until the target is rendered unconscious. If the target survives the draining attempt, the Persistent Condition is removed after the target rests for 8 hours.

title: Energy Reading
description: Beings can read the emotions of any sentient being within 6 squares. As a Standard Action, a being can make a Perception check against a target's Will Defense. A successful check reveals the target's emotional state (such as happy, sad, nervous, or scared).

title: Energy Surge
description: Once per encounter, a being can gain a temporary boost to quickness and reflexes. When this ability is activated as a Swift Action, a being gains a +2 bonus on Dexterity-based Skill Checks, and doubles its base speed. The Energy Surge lasts for a number of rounds equal to the being's Constitution modifier (minimum 1 round). When the energy is expended, the being moves -1 Persistent step along the Condition Track. The penalties imposed by this condition persist until the being takes at least 10 minutes to recuperate, during which time the creature can't engage in any strenuous activity.

title: Environmental Adaptation
description: Beings gain a +5 Species bonus to their Fortitude Defense against the effects of Extreme Temperatures and Radiation.

title: Evolved Intellect
description: Whenever a being spends a Force Point for any reason, the being gains a temporary Force Point, that can only be spent to add to an Intelligence-based Skill Check. If the temporary Force Point has not been used by the end of the encounter, it is lost.

title: Expert Climber
description: A being may choose to Take 10 on Climb checks even when distracted or threatened.

title: Expert Pilot
description: A being may choose to reroll any Pilot check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted even if it is worse.

title: Expert Swimmer
description: A being may choose to reroll any Swim check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse. In addition, a being may choose to Take 10 on Swim checks, even when distracted or threatened.

title: Expressive Pheromones
description: Beings communicate silently with other members of their Species by emitting complex pheromones. This form of communication has a maximum range of 20 squares. Species with the Scent Species Trait can detect beings' pheromones by smell, but this does not allow them to understand what the beings are communicating.

title: Extra Arms
description: Beings can hold up to four items or Weapons at a time (or six, depending on the Species). This ability does not grant extra attacks; however, it does mean a being can wield two two-handed weapons at a time (or three, depending on the Species).

title: Fast Healing
description: Whenever a being takes its Second Wind, it regains 5 Hit Points every round at the end of its turn until killed, the end of the encounter, or until reaching one-half Hit Points (whichever comes first).

title: Fearless
description: Beings gain a +5 Species bonus to their Will Defense to resist Fear effects, as well as against the Intimidate application of the Persuasion skill.

title: Feline Reflexes
description: Beings gain a +1 Species bonus to their Reflex Defense.

title: Flash of Genius
description: Once per encounter, a being can add a +5 circumstance bonus to to the result of one Knowledge, Mechanics, or Use Computer skill check.

title: Flight
description: Beings are capable of flight, but cannot do so if they are carrying a Heavy Load.

title: Force Blast
description: Once per encounter a being can make an Untrained Use the Force check to activate the Force Blast Force Power. A being who takes the Force Training feat automatically adds a single use of the Force Blast Force Power to his or her Force Power Suite (for free) instead of this ability.

title: Force Blind
description: Beings cannot take the Force Sensitivity feat. They can still increase their Dark Side Score and are still affected by Force Powers, Force Talents, and the Use the Force skill as normal.

title: Force Immunity
description: Beings can't take the Force Sensitivity Feat, can't make Use the Force checks, and never gain Force Points. In addition, they are immune to any Force effect that targets their Will Defense (including Force Powers and aspects of the Use the Force skill).

title: Force Resistance
description: Beings receive a +5 bonus to their Will Defense against any use of the Use the Force skill.

title: Force Sight
description: Beings can "see" by using The Force. They act normally, without taking any penalties for blindness when in the presence of living creatures, or life of any kind. This trait enables them to make Perception checks, and read and write as a sighted person. Beings can ignore the effect of darkness as if they had Darkvision. Beings cannot, however, detect creatures that are "invisible" to The Force such as the Yuuzhan Vong and the Ysalamiri. These creatures have Total Concealment from beings, as do creatures in areas the dampen or suppress The Force. Additionally, beings ignore all penalties to Perception checks from Cover and Concealment (but not Total Cover or Total Concealment). Beings do not increase the DC of Use the Force checks made to Sense Surroundings against targets with Total Cover.

title: Frightening Visage
description: A being may choose to reroll any Persuasion check made to Intimidate, keeping the better of the two results.

title: Grasping Tentacles
description: Beings gain a +2 Species bonus to Climb checks and a +2 Species bonus to Grab and Grapple checks.

title: Great Fortitude
description: Beings gain a +2 Species bonus to their Fortitude Defense.

title: Hardy
description: Whenever a being uses their Second Wind, they regain a number of additional Hit Points equal to 5 + its Character Level.

title: Healing Glands
description: A being is always considered to have a Medpac or Medical Kit for the purposes of making Treat Injury checks, and can perform Trained Only applications of the Treat Injury skill even when Untrained.

title: Heightened Agility
description: A being can reroll any Acrobatics check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Heightened Awareness
description: A being can choose to reroll any Perception check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Hibernation
description: A being can use the Force Trance application of the Use the Force skill Untrained (and even if not Force-sensitive) and can remain in the trance indefinitely. A being in such a state ceases to Age, and needs no food, water, or air until it emerges from Hibernation.

title: Hive Mind
description: A being within 1 kilometer of another member of its Species can communicate with it via Telepathy.

title: Hold Breath
description: A being can hold his or her breath for a number of rounds equal to 25 times his or her Constitution score before needing to make Endurance checks to hold his or her breath.

title: Impose Order
description: Once per encounter, a being can spend a Swift Action to allow each ally within 12 squares to move up to half that ally's Speed as a Reaction. This movement does not provoke Attacks of Opportunity.

title: Inborn Resilience
description: A being can catch a Second Wind even when unconscious (no Action required, but the Second Wind can only be taken when the being would normally get a turn). Catching a Second Wind while unconscious also moves the being +3 steps on the Condition Track.

title: Innate Accuracy
description: Once per encounter, a being can Aim by taking a single Swift Action instead of two Swift Actions.

title: Inspired
description: Whenever a being receives a morale or insight bonus from any source, the bonus increases by +1.

title: Intimidating Presence
description: Beings may choose to reroll any Persuasion check made to Intimidate others, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Intuitive Initiative
description: A being may choose to reroll any Initiative check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted even if it is worse.

title: Iron Will
description: Beings gain a +2 Species bonus to their Will Defense.

title: Irrepressible Mind
description: Once per encounter, as a Free Action at the start of his or her turn, a being can negate or remove any Mind-Affecting effects.

title: Joiners
description: Whenever a being reduces a living creature with an Intelligence score of 3 or higher to 0 Hit Points, or the being knocks the creature unconscious by moving it down the Condition Track, the being can transform the target into a Joiner. The target must be Helpless for this to occur. The process takes 1 minute and exposes the target to mind-altering pheromones. Once the target becomes a Joiner, its Attitude shifts to Friendly to the being and its allies, and the target gains a +10 bonus to its Will Defense against attempts to use Persuasion to alter its perceptions of its new being friends. A target transformed into a Joiner in this manner can make a DC 20 Intelligence check once per day to remove the effect and return to its original Attitude. This is a Mind-Affecting effect.

title: Keen Force Sense
description: Beings may choose to reroll any Use the Force check made to Search Your Feelings or Sense Force, keeping the better of the two results.

title: Lightning Reflexes
description: Beings gain a +2 Species bonus to their Reflex Defense.

title: Limb Regeneration
description: A being can regrow a lost limb in 1d10 days. At the end of this time, all Persistent penalties associated with the loss of the limb are removed.

title: Limited Precognition
description: Once per encounter, as a Reaction, a being can grant themself or any Vehicle the being Pilots a +2 Species bonus to Reflex Defense against any single attack.

title: Limited Telepathy
description: Beings can use the Telepathy aspect of the Use the Force skill Untrained (even if not Force-sensitive). If the target of the Telepathy is within 10 squares, no skill check is required to initiate the telepathic contact.

title: Lockbite
description: A being that makes a successful Grapple attack gains a +5 bonus to subsequent Grapple checks against the target.

title: Logical Reasoning
description: A being can use their Intelligence modifier in place of their Charisma modifier on Persuasion checks.

title: Low-Light Vision
description: Beings ignore Concealment (But not Total Concealment) from darkness.

title: Mechanical Aptitude
description: Once per encounter, a being can treat any single Mechanics check as if the die roll is a Natural 20.

title: Mechanical Savant
description: Once per encounter, a being can make a Standard Action Mechanics or Use Computer check as a Swift Action.

title: Meditative Trance
description: Beings can enter into a Trance that lasts for four consecutive hours. At the end of the Trance, they gain the benefits of having rested for eight consecutive hours.

title: Memory Sharing
description: Beings can share memories others of their own Species through an inborn telepathy. Sharing a memory begins with taking a Full-Round Action to initiate the link between two adjacent beings; transferring a memory requires as much time as the events being recalled. The recipient of a memory must be willing to receive it. Any character who receives a Memory Sharing from a being always gains favorable circumstances on Knowledge checks related to that memory. Force-using characters can also receive Memory Sharing from a being with a successful DC 15 Use the Force check, made as a Reaction.

title: Mender
description: A being Trained in Treat Injury reduces the Treat Injury DC for all applications of the skill by his or her Wisdom modifier.

title: Mental Fortitude
description: Beings gain a +2 Species bonus to their Will Defense against Deception and Persuasion checks.

title: Mental Instability
description: For each Age Category a being advances past Adult, it takes a loss of -1 Wisdom. Beings never gain increased Wisdom due to Age, though they can increase their Wisdom scores as their Character Level increases.

title: Mesmerize
description: As a Standard Action, a being can make a special attack against the Will Defense of a single target within 6 squares of the being. The attack modifier is equal to the being's Character Level plus his or her Charisma modifier. If the attack is successful, the target loses its Standard Action for its next turn. If the attack fails, the target is immune to this effect for 24 hours. This is a Mind-Affecting effect.

title: Multiple Limbs
description: When making multiple attacks, a being reduces the penalty to its attack rolls by 2.

title: Musical Obfuscation
description: A being can reroll any Deception check to convey Deceptive Information, keeping the better of the two results. A being can also project their sounds out to a range of 10 squares. As a Swift Action, a being Create a Diversion to Hide.

title: Mute
description: Beings have no vocal cords, and must rely on a combination of sign language, computers, and Telepathy in order to communicate with others. When they learn new Languages, they can understand but not speak them.

title: Natural Armor (+1)
description: A being gains a +1 Natural Armor bonus to their Reflex Defense. A Natural Armor bonus stacks with an Armor bonus.

title: Natural Armor (+2)
description: A being gains a +2 Natural Armor bonus to their Reflex Defense. A Natural Armor bonus stacks with an Armor bonus.

title: Natural Camouflage
description: A being can choose to reroll any Stealth check to Sneak, keeping the better of the two results.

title: Natural Curiosity
description: Once per encounter as a Standard Action, a being can make a Perception check against a single target within line of sight (DC 15 or the result of an opposed Stealth check, if the target is actively attempting to hide). If successful, the being gains a +1 insight bonus on attack rolls against that target.

title: Natural Diplomat
description: A being gains a +5 Species bonus to Persuasion checks made to Haggle. Additionally, Persuasion is always a Class Skill for beings.

title: Natural Telepath
description: A being gains a +5 Species bonus using the Telepathy aspect of the Use the Force skill and can make Untrained Use the Force checks to use this application even without the Force Sensitivity feat.

title: Natural Weapons
description: A being has Natural Weapons, in some form or another. When a being makes an Unarmed attack, it may choose to use its Natural Weapons, dealing 1d6 points of damage (Bludgeoning/Piercing/Slashing) with that attack, instead of normal Unarmed damage. Beings are always considered armed with their Natural Weapons.

title: Observant
description: Once per encounter, a being can use their Perception skill modifier in place of their Deception or Persuasion skill modifier.

title: Pacifism
description: As a Standard Action, a being can make a Persuasion check against the Will Defense of a single target within line of sight. If the check is successful, the target moves -1 step along the Condition Track if it makes any attacks before the start of the being's next turn. If this check is unsuccessful, the target is immune to the being's Pacifism for the remainder of the encounter. This is a Mind-Affecting effect. The target must be able to hear and understand the being for this ability to have any effect, and any single target can be affected only once at any given time (meaning that multiple beings may not use this ability on the same target at the same time).

title: Pack Hunter
description: Beings deal an additional 2 points of damage on melee attacks against opponents they Flank.

title: Partial Invisibility
description: A being in shadowy illumination or darker conditions is treated as having Total Concealment. Beings are fully visible and gain no Concealment against opponents with Darkvision.

title: Persistent
description: A being can reroll any Endurance check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Pheromonal Sensor
description: A being can reroll any Perception check made to Sense Deception or Sense Influence, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Pheromone Acclimation
description: Beings gain a +5 Species bonus to their Fortitude Defense against the Pheromones of other members of their Species.

title: Pheromones
description: As a Standard Action, a being can make a special attack against any adjacent creature. The attack modifier is equal to the being's Character Level plus their Charisma modifier. If the attack equals or exceeds the target's Fortitude Defense, that target moves -1 step along the Condition Track. If the attack fails to beat the target's Fortitude Defense, the target is immune to the being's Pheromones for 24 hours. When the target is reduced to a total of -5 steps, instead of Falling Unconscious, the target's Attitude improves to Friendly. Pheromones function as an Inhaled Poison. Any creature holding its breath is unaffected (see Endurance for more details). A creature can be affected by Pheromones only once per round. Multiple exposures to Pheromones from different beings in the same round produce no additional effects. A Hostile creature cannot be targeted by this effect.

title: Physically Intimidating
description: Beings use their Strength modifier instead of their Charisma modifier for Persuasion checks made to Intimidate others.

title: Placid
description: Once per encounter, as a Free Action, a being can remove one Fear effect currently affecting it.

title: Poison (Species)
description: If the Natural Weapons of a being can deal damage to a living target, the target is also Poisoned. If the Poison succeeds on an attack roll (1d20 + the being's Character Level) against the target's Fortitude Defense, the target moves -1 step along the Condition Track. A target moved to the end of the Condition Track by the Poison is Immobilized, but not Unconscious.

title: Predator's Heritage
description: Beings gain a +2 Species bonus on damage rolls against a target that has been damaged since the beginning of the being's last turn.

title: Prehensile Tail
description: A being's tail can effectively hold (but not wield) a Small or smaller item. When holding a Medium or larger item with his or her tail, a being is encumbered and is considered to be carrying a Heavy Load.

title: Presence Sense
description: When making a Survival check to Track a living creature, a being gains a Species bonus equal to the quarry's Force Point total.

title: Primitive
description: Beings do not gain Weapon Proficiency (Heavy Weapons), Weapon Proficiency (Pistols), or Weapon Proficiency (Rifles) as starting Feats at first level, even if their Class normally grants them.

title: Quality Repairs
description: When a being uses the Repair or Jury-Rig applications of the Mechanics skill, the target Droid or device regains an additional 1d8 Hit Points.

title: Radiation Resistance
description: Beings receive a +5 Species bonus to their Fortitude Defense against Radiation. In addition, beings never gain a Persistent Condition from the effects of Radiation.

title: Rage
description: Once per day, a being can fly into a Rage as a Swift Action. While Raging, the being temporarily gains a +2 Rage bonus on melee attack rolls and melee damage rolls, but cannot use Skills that require patience and concentration, such as Mechanics, Stealth, or Use the Force. A fit of Rage lasts for a number of rounds equal to 5 + the being's Constitution modifier. At the end of its Rage, the being moves -1 Persistent step along the Condition Track. The penalties imposed by this Persistent Condition persist until the being takes at least 10 minutes to recuperate, during which time the being can't engage in any strenuous activity.

title: Reach
description: Beings have a natural Reach of 2 squares.

title: Reactive Claw
description: Once per encounter when a being damages an opponent with a melee attack, the being can make a single melee attack with its Natural Weapons against that target as a Swift Action. The being must have one hand free at the time to make this attack (and thus cannot be wielding a two-handed weapon).

title: Regeneration
description: A being can regrow lost body parts- including significant portions of its physical structure and individual limbs- in 1d10 minutes. At the end of that time, all Persistent penalties associated with the loss of one or more limbs are removed.

title: Repulsive Appearance
description: Beings may reroll Persuasion checks to Intimidate, and may keep the better result. They also gain a +5 bonus to their Will Defense when others attempt to use the Persuasion skill against them.

title: Resilience
description: Once per encounter, when a being would be moved down the Condition Track by taking damage equal to or exceeding the being's Damage Threshold, the being may reduce the number of steps moved down the Condition Track by 1 (to a minimum of 0 steps).

title: Resilient
description: Beings gain a +1 Species bonus to their Fortitude Defense.

title: Resilient Physiology
description: A being's Damage Threshold is doubled after adding bonuses for Feats and size when determining whether the being is killed by an attack (but not for any other purpose).

title: Roller
description: A being can curl into a ball and quickly roll along the ground. As a Swift Action, a being can increase his or her base Speed by 4 squares. In this form, the being can only take the Move, Withdraw, Catch a Second Wind, Drop an Item, Recover, and Run Actions. The being can also spend a Swift Action to emerge from their rolling form, losing the +4 Speed bonus and regaining access to all Actions he or she can normally take.

title: Scavenger
description: Whenever a being armed with an Ion weapon successfully damages a Droid or Vehicle, the being adds half their Character Level in Ion damage.

title: Scent
description: At close range (within 10 squares), beings ignore Concealment and Cover for purposes of Perception checks, and take no penalty from poor visibility while Tracking.

title: Scholarly Inclination
description: At 1st level, a being gains any one Knowledge skill as a bonus Trained Skill.

title: Self-Sustaining
description: Beings do not suffer the effect of Starvation, except in sterile environments.

title: Sensor Cones
description: A being can use the Sense Force and Sense Surroundings applications of the Use the Force skill Untrained.

title: Serpentine
description: Beings are always considered to have a Running Start for Jump checks. They also gain a +5 stability bonus when making Grapple checks against the Trip Feat.

title: Shadow Swiftness
description: If a being begins its turn with Concealment from a target or with the target unaware of it, the being does not provoke Attacks of Opportunity when moving through the target's threatened space until the end of the being's turn.

title: Shapeshift
description: A being can Shapeshift into any humanoid Species of its Size category as a Full-Round Action. While Shapeshifted, a being gains a +10 Species bonus on Deception checks made for Deceptive Appearances to disguise its appearance. Additionally, a being can perform a Deceptive Appearance to disguise its appearance as a Full-Round Action at no penalty.

title: Silver Tongued
description: A being may choose to reroll any Persuasion check, keeping the better of the two results.

title: Skilled Grappler
description: Beings gain a +5 Species bonus to both Grab and Grapple checks.

title: Sneaky
description: A beings can choose to reroll any Stealth check to Sneak, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Social Cunning
description: Beings may use their Wisdom modifier in place of their Charisma modifier for determining their bonus on Deception and Persuasion checks.

title: Soothing Pheromones
description: A being gains a +5 Species bonus on Persuasion checks made to Change Attitude. This bonus does not apply to other beings of the same Species, as beings are acclimated to their own pheromones.

title: Soothing Voice
description: A being may choose to reroll any Persuasion check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Spatial Awareness
description: Beings ignore all Cover and Concealment when making Perception checks to Notice Targets within 10 squares.

title: Special Equipment
description: Beings require special equipment.

title: Startle
description: Once per encounter, as a Reaction to being attacked, a being can make a Deception check against the target's Will Defense. If successful, the attacker takes a -5 penalty on their attack roll.

title: Stoic
description: Any creature attempting to use the Sense Deception or Sense Influence applications of the Perception skill on a being takes a -5 penalty to the skill check.

title: Strength of Conviction
description: Beings can use their Charisma modifier in place of their Wisdom modifier when calculating their Will Defense.

title: Strength Surge
description: Once per encounter, a being can perform one of the following actions - Reroll one Strength-based Ability Check or Skill Check using a doubled Strength modifier (minimum +1), or Add +2 to one damage roll when making a successful melee attack to which a Strength bonus is normally added (this benefit does not apply when the Weapon Finesse feat is used)

title: Stronger by Age
description: At Middle Age, a being adds a +1 Species bonus to their Strength and Constitution scores. At Old, this bonus increases to +2. Beings do not increase their Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma; nor decrease their Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution as they Age.

title: Stun Resistance
description: Beings receive a +5 Species bonus to their Damage Threshold against Stunning.

title: Sturdy
description: Whenever a being catches a Second Wind, he or she regains a number of additional Hit Points equal to 5 + one-half its level.

title: Superior Defenses
description: Beings gain a +1 Species bonus to all their Defenses.

title: Supreme Stability
description: A being is completely immune to being knocked Prone.

title: Survival Instinct
description: A being may choose to reroll any Survival check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted even if it is worse.

title: Survivalist
description: On a successful Survival check made for Basic Survival, a being can provide food and water for a number of additional beings equal to their Wisdom modifier.

title: Swimming
description: Beings possess an inherent Swim speed.

title: Target Awareness
description: A being takes no distance penalties on Perception checks made to notice targets for the first 50 squares between the being and its targets.

title: Tech Savvy
description: A being can reroll any Knowledge (Technology) check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse. Additionally, a beings is not limited to Common Knowledge when making an Untrained Knowledge (Technology) check.

title: Tinkerer
description: A being can choose to reroll any Mechanics check, but must keep the second result, even if it is worse. In addition, Mechanics is always a Class Skill for beings.

title: Toxic Resistance
description: Beings receive a +5 Species bonus to their Fortitude Defense against Poisons and Toxic Atmospheres.

title: Unsettling
description: Once per encounter, when an being successfully uses the Persuasion skill to Intimidate a target, the being can move the target -1 step on the Condition Track instead of applying one of the standard Intimidation effects. The target must be within 6 squares of the being, and the effect lasts until the end of the encounter. This is a Mind-Affecting effect.

title: Vacuum Immunity
description: Beings are immune to the effects of a Vacuum.

title: Variable Size
description: Beings can be of different size under certain circumstances.

title: Visually Striking
description: A being's Charisma bonus is doubled when they use the Persuasion skill on Humans and Near-Humans.

title: Warrior Culture
description: Beings can reroll any Knowledge (Tactics) check, but the result of the reroll must be accepted, even if it is worse.

title: Warrior's Awareness
description: Once per encounter as a Reaction, a being can gain the benefit of the Uncanny Dodge I and Uncanny Dodge II Talents until the beginning of the being's next turn.

title: Weapon Familiarity
description: Beings treat a particular weapon or weapon type as a different Weapon Group.

title: Xenophobia
description: Beings gain a +2 Species bonus to their Will Defense against Persuasion checks made to improve their Attitude by any creature of a different Species.
